items.d: a way to show you feel bad that a good thing did not happen

items.d: wanting to keep the old way of life and not wanting anything new

items.d: to be awake at night and not go to bed

items.d: when you do one thing not like you always do

items.d: not nice when you speak to people

items.d: so amazing or strange that it is very surprising

items.d: to become very cold

items.d: a way to tell a friend it is OK and not bad
